title: Household drinking-water reserve rotation
summary: Store labelled containers in a cool protected place, record fill or purchase date, inspect for damage, and rotate before trust is lost.
content: Store labelled containers in a cool protected place, record fill or purchase date, inspect for damage, and rotate before trust is lost. Keep additional water for hot climates, pregnancy, illness, disability, pets, and longer outages where practical. Do not refill a contaminated or chemical container for drinking water.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Household drinking-water reserve rotation”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Household drinking-water reserve rotation»

short_term: For Household drinking-water reserve rotation, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Household drinking-water reserve rotation, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Household drinking-water reserve rotation, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Household drinking-water reserve rotation to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
